The mission/session logs show no forbidden git verbs, but the same audit reports that mission commit `619efcff864e06645b11dfc714c5cada4d0cffe3` makes the mission `git log --stat` path set exceed the contract’s allow-list, so the combined git-safety check does not pass as written.

frictions: Direct `git diff --name-only $(git merge-base HEAD main)..HEAD` is empty on the current `main` checkout, so the git-scope assertions required the mission audit handoff's reconstructed continuation-core range instead of the live merge-base diff.

Current working tree noise is limited to `.factory/library/user-testing.md` plus unrelated untracked `.pi/` and `.sisyphus/` entries; per task guidance, the untracked local artifacts were treated as non-failures.
